observations: Repository root mixed active workspace files with stale helper scripts, duplicate docs, generated reports, and legacy empty directories.
Worktree was already dirty before execution and unrelated deletions were preserved.
Root env presets existed alongside backend and frontend env templates and needed role clarification.
The root package lockfile still reflected an unused workspace dependency.
hazards: Do not overwrite or revert pre-existing user modifications.
Only remove files shown to be duplicate, generated, or unreferenced by the active workspace flow.
